title: Tricuspis purpurea
taxonomy: Tricuspis purpurea is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, native to South Africa. It is a bulbous perennial with attractive, purple flowers. The genus Tricuspis is part of the larger family Asparagaceae, which includes many other plants such as asparagus and agapanthus. Tricuspis purpurea is further classified within the order Asparagales and the subclass Liliidae. This classification indicates that Tricuspis purpurea is closely related to other plants in the same family and order.

In some traditional medicine practices, Tricuspis purpurea is used to treat respiratory problems and wounds.
